30 day challenge: Posts from month-long personal experiments — from quitting caffeine to daily photography.
sxsw: Notes, recaps, and reflections from South by Southwest conferences.
facebook: Commentary on Facebook as a platform, its features, and its cultural impact.
Twitter: Observations about Twitter, its community dynamics, and its role in online discourse.
Google: Posts touching on Google products, services, and their influence on the web.
Apple: Writing about Apple hardware, software, and the ecosystem.
death: Reflections on mortality, loss, and grief across different areas of life.
New York: Life in and observations about New York.
engagement: Posts about getting engaged and the journey toward marriage.
Movable Type: Tips, tutorials, and commentary on the Movable Type publishing platform.
freewrite: Stream-of-consciousness writing exercises — raw, unedited, time-boxed.
